_comment: Shared golden vectors for the anchor-hunk normalization contract (docs/anchor-hunk-normalization.md). `vectors` pins the BACK half: each `body` is the list of hunk body lines AFTER the leading +/space diff marker has been stripped and removed (-) lines have been dropped (i.e. the input to normalizeBody); `expected` is sha256(normalizeBody(body))[:16]. `raw_vectors` pins the FRONT half end-to-end: each `diff` is a raw `git diff -U0` payload (the actual CLI input) and the worker MUST run its real parse -> marker-strip -> normalize -> hash pipeline over it (parseDiffHunks -> hashNormalizedBody, located at `line`) and assert `expected_hunk_hash` / `expected_dirty_diff_hash`. The weightless Go outcome worker MUST load this same file and assert byte-identical hashes for both halves; any divergence in parsing, -U0 handling, marker-strip, or the whitespace-collapse rule fails a test on both sides.

vectors.name: whitespace_reflow_of_canonical
vectors.note: Same content as canonical_body but with collapsed/expanded whitespace; MUST hash identically.

vectors.name: one_char_content_edit
vectors.note: canonical_body with '+' changed to '-'; MUST differ from canonical.

raw_vectors.name: canonical_raw_diff
raw_vectors.note: A raw `git diff -U0` payload (full file header + @@ + added body) for the canonical Add() hunk. Exercises parseDiffHunks -> marker-strip -> normalize -> hash end-to-end; the resulting hunk_hash MUST equal the BACK-half canonical_body vector (becae935df3b19d6), proving the FRONT half feeds the BACK half byte-identically.
raw_vectors.diff:
diff --git a/math.go b/math.go
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/math.go
+++ b/math.go
@@ -1,0 +2,3 @@ package mathx
+func Add(a, b int) int {
+	return a + b
+}

raw_vectors.name: whitespace_reflow_raw_diff_shifted_positions
raw_vectors.note: Same Add() content but whitespace-reflowed AND at a shifted @@ position (new-side line 41). MUST hash identically to canonical_raw_diff: positions are read only to locate the hunk, never hashed; whitespace runs collapse.

raw_vectors.name: one_char_content_edit_raw_diff
raw_vectors.note: canonical_raw_diff with '+' changed to '-' in the body line; MUST differ from canonical (matches BACK-half one_char_content_edit, 3945ebb26cf1c908).
raw_vectors.diff:
diff --git a/math.go b/math.go
index 5555555..6666666 100644
--- a/math.go
+++ b/math.go
@@ -1,0 +2,3 @@ package mathx
+func Add(a, b int) int {
+	return a - b
+}

raw_vectors.name: replace_line_raw_diff_drops_removed
raw_vectors.note: A `-U0` replace hunk (one removed line, one added line). The removed line is dropped; only the added line contributes. Locks marker-strip + removed-line drop on real -U0 text.

raw_vectors.name: two_hunk_raw_diff
raw_vectors.note: A two-hunk `-U0` diff in one file. hunk_hash at line 21 selects ONLY the second (replace) hunk; dirty_diff_hash hashes the concatenation of BOTH hunk bodies. Locks multi-hunk parsing, per-hunk location, and the whole-file coarse anchor on real -U0 text.
raw_vectors.diff:
diff --git a/svc.go b/svc.go
index 7777777..8888888 100644
--- a/svc.go
+++ b/svc.go
@@ -5,0 +6,1 @@ func top() {
+	log("top")
@@ -20,1 +21,1 @@ func bottom() {
-	old()
+	new()
